text.p: and I send you greetings from , . You wonder what we are doing in at this time. I actually left on May 7th to go to , . You are aware of the Jesus Film follow-up video series that we have been working on for a while. The village episodes are being filmed in a village called just outside . I was with them for 10 days and I saw the Lord manifest Himself in several ways. , the Nigerian scriptwriter was there most of the time I was there. The director is a professional who understood well what we wanted, the producer was quite good and the actors were professionals. The series will be excellent not only for follow-up of new believers but will help any Christian to get grounded in their faith and be prepared to help others. They are also quite entertaining.

I flew from to in the morning of May 18th and joined me here the following day. We have been in the regional conference with other leaders from all over Africa and the Middle East, preparing ourselves to strategically reach Africa for Christ. And planning for what we call Vision 2020.

That conference was over yesterday and and I are still in . We are joining with others from , , and different parts of in the African Disciplemakers’ summit. For and me, our passion for personal ministry is multiplying disciplemaking. We have been doing it in addition to our official assignments and have been encouraging others to do the same. This summit brings disciplemakers from some parts of Africa together in to see how the Lord is bringing spiritual and numerical growth to the Churches in and causing them to become missionary sending churches. We are now in but in the next few days, we will be on the road. We are travelling up to 400 kilometers into the interior.
